text:
A user was dialed in using trumpet when he disconnected for no reason
I found the above error message in /var/log/messages at the time he
disconnected.  I cannot find what a signal 4 is.

How-To-Repeat: Don't know, he said he was creating a message with eudora when it
dropped.  I know of no other problem
